ops.title: For cc-pushback corpus analysis, target the rsync mirror, never local ~/.claude/projects
ops.body:
When analyzing "the corpus" for cc-pushback (review formats, feedback shapes, detector coverage, signal frequency), the source of truth is the **cached remote mirror**, NOT this machine's local sessions:

- **Transcripts:** `~/.cc-pushback/mirrors/yasyf` — ~11k `.jsonl`, rsync'd from `ssh yasyf@yasyf:~/.claude/projects` (project-name-mangled dirs, same layout as `~/.claude/projects`).
- **Superset findings:** `~/.cc-pushback/mirrors/yasyf-superset/<uuid>/.../​.context/cleanup/issues.jsonl` — pre-extracted rule/severity/evidence/suggested_fix findings.
- Scanned via `cc-pushback scan --transcripts ~/.cc-pushback/mirrors/yasyf`; feedback DB at `~/.cc-pushback/feedback.db`.

**Why:** The local `~/.claude/projects/` is just this dev box's sessions — a small, unrepresentative slice. I once cataloged review formats off it and "proved" the conductor/superset formats matched nothing and reviews were Claude-authored self-reviews — conclusions that are likely wrong for the real corpus. The mirror is the production data cc-pushback actually scans.

**How to apply:** Before any "search the corpus / what formats exist / how common is X" task, point the tooling at `~/.cc-pushback/mirrors/yasyf` (and the superset issues mirror). If a `cc-transcript` subcommand defaults to `~/.claude/projects`, override its root to the mirror. Treat local-only findings as suspect. See [[cc-pushback-ecosystem-map]] (Production data + Review formats lines) and [[cc-pushback-two-stage-pipeline]].

**GOTCHA (cost a corpus-pollution incident 2026-07-03): `cc-pushback scan` with NO `--transcripts` defaults to `CLAUDE_PROJECTS_DIR` = local `~/.claude/projects`, NOT the mirror.** A bare `cc-pushback scan --full` scanned this cc-pool box's local sessions and wrote 934 local rows (agent-automation pushback, not the user's authentic style) into the production `feedback.db`, which then auto-synced to HF — while the mirror's new rows were never mined. ALWAYS pass `--transcripts ~/.cc-pushback/mirrors/yasyf` for any production scan. Verify after a scan by checking `origin_path` in `feedback_events` starts with `.../mirrors/`, not `/.claude/projects/`.
